_publications._publicationTitle: Forward genetic screen for malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor formation identifies new genes and pathways driving tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: SB mutagenesis on both pre-disposed alleles led to neurofibroma development, significantly increased grade 3 PNST development (p=0.0005)
details: SB mutagenesis on both pre-disposed alleles led to significantly increased grade 3 PNST development (p=0.0005)
